title: Liquidity-aware entry gating and adaptive discovery cadence
summary: Add liquidity-aware entry gating: age-banded liquidity floors plus cheap route survivability scoring (1–2 buckets) to reject fragile candidates before execution. Add adaptive discovery cadence using derived policy effective_discovery_interval_seconds and expose cadence reason. Preserve minimal operator config; legacy env vars remain optional overrides only. Update operator docs to explain derived policy and liquidity-aware gating.
why_safe: Entry gating adds pre-execution rejects only; it does not loosen any existing safety rails.
Survivability uses at most one additional quote_sell in the youngest age band; no probing ladder or spam loops.
Discovery cadence changes only reduce frequency under pressure; no new services or async complexity.
commit_message: Add liquidity-aware entry gating, survivability checks, and adaptive discovery cadence
notes_for_cursor: Scope limited to runtime_policy/trader/config/docs + focused liquidity gating tests and workflow artifacts.
